free_text: Effects of nuclear spin on the elastic scattering of 5
MeV neutrons.
NE 213 liquid scintillator.
Neutron flux monitored by long counter at 140 degrees.
Flight path resolution of 7 nsec was sufficient to
separate elastic peak from inelastic continuum in
time spectra.  Relative yield determined by
symmetrizing the entire peak around the centroid of
the upper portion of the peak.
Corrected for multiple scattering and for finite
geometry using code MANIAC.
Estimated error from all sources. Error may
be higher near minima where multiple scattering
corrections are higher.
Normalization uncertainty estimated to be 10%.
Data given in Table 2 of the reference (with
angles in degrees in place of cosine)
Translated from SCISRS
Converted to REACTION formalism
Converted to new date formats, lower case.
Energy and angular resolution moved to subentry 1;
MONITOR corrected.
OS. Corrections in subs. 3-5, 7-10,12,13
Reaction product added.
Possible inclusion of inelastic scattering below
E(exc) ~ 0.45 MeV was found by S.Simakov
